goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should 'leave after 10:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from birmingham new street and should leave on wednesday
The train should leave after 10:15 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get price and arrival time
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve chinese food
